item.title: Operation Compass Rose VI Strengthens Maritime Cooperation
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain— Combined Maritime Forces (CMF) successfully concluded Operation Compass Rose VI, its flagship multinational training engagement, April 20-22, 2026. This year, the engagem…

item.title: Combined Maritime Forces Maintains Operations During Middle East Conflict
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain – Combined Maritime Forces (CMF) has continued to deliver operational outputs despite the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, maintaining uninterrupted maritime security activ…

item.title: UK Assumes Command of Combined Maritime Forces’Combined Task Force 151

item.title: Indian Navy-led CTF 154 conducts staff training aboard INS Surat

item.title: India Assumes Command of Combined Maritime Forces’ CombinedTask Force 154

item.title: Algeria travel advice
item.description: FCDO travel advice for Algeria. Includes safety and security, insurance, entry requirements and legal differences.

item.description: This factsheet summarises how the UK is supporting Ukraine following the Russian invasion.

item.title: UK-ASEAN (Association of South East Asian Nations) factsheet
item.description: This factsheet gives an overview of the UK government's relationship with the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) and our priorities in the region.

item.title: Libya: list of designations and sanctions notices
item.description: List of designated persons and notices issued about new designations, revocations, delistings and other changes to the UK Sanctions List.

item.title: The UK Sanctions List
item.description: Find out which people, entities and ships are designated or specified under regulations made under the Sanctions and Anti-Money Laundering Act 2018, and why.

item.title: Arrested or in prison in Barbados
item.description: This guide provides information about being arrested in Barbados and what conditions are like in prison there.
